notes.heroes: All BG heroes (battlegroundsHero). No per-patch pool flag exists.
notes.trinkets: All trinkets in game files. No pool flag — assumed all active.
notes.anomalies: All anomalies in game files. No pool flag — assumed all active.
notes.quest_rewards: All quest rewards. Quests may not be active every season.
notes.buddies: All buddy cards. Buddy system may not be active every season.
notes.tokens: Minions/spells referenced by pool minions (deathrattle summons etc).
